title: Disable local (key-based) auth on the Azure OpenAI account [AI.102]
detection_signal: account.disable_local_auth == true

title: Use Microsoft Entra Auth with Managed Identity instead of API keys [AI.62]
detection_signal: account.identity.type in {SystemAssigned, UserAssigned}

title: Restrict access to selected virtual networks or use private endpoints [AI.103]
detection_signal: account.publicNetworkAccess == Disabled or private endpoint present

title: Diagnostic logs enabled on Azure AI service resources [AI.86]
detection_signal: account has at least one diagnostic setting with a workspace_id

title: Content-Safety baseline content filter attached to approved models [AI.52]
detection_signal: no content-filter triggers AND RAI policy attached to deployments

title: Jailbreak / prompt-injection risk detection on the agent prompt [AI.93]
detection_signal: LLM scans system prompt for override-phrasing / unbounded role-play

title: Enable monitoring for Azure OpenAI / Foundry instances [AI.130]
detection_signal: foundry_control.diagnostics.status == ok

title: Repository has an AgentOps PR gate (IaC + eval CI) [AI.135]
detection_signal: .github/workflows/agentops-pr.yml exists

title: Repository has deploy workflows so evals re-run after deployment [AI.2]
detection_signal: at least one .github/workflows/agentops-deploy-*.yml exists

title: Agent target pinned to a version (detect model / prompt drift) [AI.128]
detection_signal: agentops.yaml agent: <name>:<version>

title: Evaluate system with a golden dataset (regression detection) [AI.172]
detection_signal: regression check: latest_metric - baseline_metric > threshold_drop

title: Evaluator bundle covers groundedness / relevance / coherence for the agent [AI.147]
detection_signal: LLM judges bundle YAML against agent description

title: Production telemetry is wired and emitting traces [AI.115]
detection_signal: monitor.status == ok AND request_count > 0 over lookback

title: Production error rate under threshold (retry + healthchecks effective) [AI.9]
detection_signal: errors / requests > rate_threshold over the lookback window

title: Foundry agent runs not failing [AI.13]
detection_signal: foundry.failure_rate > rate_threshold

title: p95 latency under threshold (App Insights + eval history) [AI.113]
detection_signal: p95_seconds > p95_threshold_seconds

title: Eval metrics are stable across runs (no flaky judge) [AI.143]
detection_signal: coefficient of variation across last N runs > flaky_cv_threshold

title: Evaluations run regularly enough to surface drift [AI.114]
detection_signal: latest run timestamp older than stale_after_days

title: Runtime emits token-usage telemetry (gen_ai.usage.*) [AI.132]
detection_signal: KQL on gen_ai.usage.input_tokens + gen_ai.usage.output_tokens; warns when request_count > 0 but token counts are zero

title: Azure OpenAI HTTP 429 (rate-limit) responses under threshold [AI.154]
detection_signal: KQL counts dependency calls with resultCode == 429 over the lookback window

title: max_tokens limit set on every model / evaluator configuration [AI.26]
detection_signal: regex match `max_tokens:` in agentops.yaml and .agentops/bundles/*.yaml
